title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's approach to using Claude Code, identifying four strategies: role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tooling, and planning before building. Marchese highlights Tan's achievement of 600,000 lines of code in 60 days while running YC.
